description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CodeQL that analyzes C++ code. The workflow should trigger on push events to the master branch for .cpp, .h, and .github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml files, on pull requests to the master branch for the same files, and on a weekly schedule. In an ubuntu-22.04 job, check out the repository with a fetch depth of 2, initialize CodeQL for C++ analysis, install required dependencies, set up qbs, build the project with qbs, and perform CodeQL analysis.
